_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: PostgreSQL
author: antigravity@gemini.internal
description: An open-source, highly robust object-relational database system. Excellent for high-performance usage like Paperless-ngx or large Nextcloud installations.
startup:
export PGPASSWORD="{{POSTGRES_PASSWORD}}"
if [ ! -d "/home/container/postgres" ]; then
    echo "Initializing database..."
    mkdir -p /home/container/postgres
    echo "{{POSTGRES_PASSWORD}}" > /tmp/pg_pass
    initdb -D /home/container/postgres -U {{POSTGRES_USER}} --pwfile=/tmp/pg_pass --auth=scram-sha-256
    rm -f /tmp/pg_pass
    echo "host all all 0.0.0.0/0 scram-sha-256" >> /home/container/postgres/pg_hba.conf
    echo "host all all 127.0.0.1/32 trust" >> /home/container/postgres/pg_hba.conf
    echo "listen_addresses = '*'" >> /home/container/postgres/postgresql.conf
fi
postgres -D /home/container/postgres -p {{SERVER_PORT}} &
PG_PID=$!
echo "Waiting for PostgreSQL to start..."
until pg_isready -h localhost -p {{SERVER_PORT}} -U {{POSTGRES_USER}}; do
    sleep 1
done
echo "Syncing database password..."
psql -h localhost -p {{SERVER_PORT}} -U {{POSTGRES_USER}} -d postgres -c "ALTER USER {{POSTGRES_USER}} WITH PASSWORD '{{POSTGRES_PASSWORD}}';"
psql -h localhost -p {{SERVER_PORT}} -U {{POSTGRES_USER}} -d postgres -tc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = '{{POSTGRES_DB}}'" | grep -q 1 || psql -h localhost -p {{SERVER_PORT}} -U {{POSTGRES_USER}} -d postgres -c "CREATE DATABASE {{POSTGRES_DB}} OWNER {{POSTGRES_USER}};"
wait $PG_PID

variables.name: Postgres Password
variables.description: The password for the default database user.

variables.name: Postgres Database
variables.description: The default database name to create.
